content: Community consensus (codewithandrea.com, multiple 2024/2025 guides) favors feature-first folder structure for small-to-medium Flutter apps: core/ (theme, constants, shared utils), features/<feature>/ with presentation (screens/widgets), and shared/ for cross-feature reusable widgets. For animation-heavy apps, CustomPainter classes are commonly grouped under a scenes/ or painters/ folder, one file per painter, decoupled from state.
